raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The MENA Inclusion Act aims to ensure that Middle Eastern and North African (MENA) groups are accurately represented and recognized in demographic data collected by the state of California.",
    "Accurate data representation is essential for informed policy making.",
    "Recognizing the MENA community as a unique and diverse group can help tackle distinct challenges faced by these communities.",
    "California is home to approximately 740,219 individuals who identify as Middle Eastern or North African (MENA).",
    "Current federal and state data classify MENA individuals under the broader 'White' category.",
    "Accurate MENA-specific data is crucial for improving state planning, resource allocation, and policy interventions.",
    "The Biden administration has announced a distinct MENA category in the 2030 U.S. Census.",
    "New York has passed legislation similar to the MENA Inclusion Act.",
    "The MENA Inclusion Act will require California state agencies to include separate categories for MENA groups in demographic data starting January 1, 2026.",
    "The lack of a formal MENA category in demographic data has perpetuated inequities in healthcare, education, civil rights, and economic opportunities.",
    "The passage of the MENA Inclusion Act will enable policymakers and community organizations to assess and address disparities faced by MENA populations."
  ]
}
```
